title: euphorbia × goldei
intro: Euphorbia × goldei, also known as the Pencil Plant or Crown of Thorns, is a popular ornamental succulent plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its sap, which contains a compound called euphorbon, a potential anti-inflammatory agent and antimicrobial agent. Consuming Euphorbia × goldei is reported to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues and infections. The plant's medicinal properties can be utilized through herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and poultices, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
